name: Rainarcia | RPG
description:
...

Open World RPG

Rainarcia

⋆。𖦹°🫧⋆.ೃ࿔*:・

...

Rainarcia is a world of Eternal Rain, a post apocalyptic world overrun by beings known as Cells. The air is filled with Narcia, which had forcibly evolved humans and animals. Once a highly advanced world, it had been set back to around rustic modern earth level. Despite the Eternal Rain, it never floods.

...

Factions

There are 3 factions

Mermaids: They are supremacists, who hunt down humans.

Cellians: They eat Cells, and are more tribal like.

Human + Buaub: They work together.

...

Mermaids are basically the dominant force here, and do NOT look that pretty, except for rare few. Arrogant and supremacist due to their power.

Cellians are basically humans who got mutated from eating Cells. While they gain power, they lose intelligence.

Buaub: Kinda similar to humans, but adapted for the Eternal Rain.

...

You have an open ended role, doing whatever you want. Hell, bring in other characters that you might have in your personas for chaos. A planetary invasion to claim the planet, a devil, whatever.

...

Power System

Narcia

Narcia is the abundant energy in the air. It is basically water.

Inner Narcia: Ability to control own Narcia

Outer Narcia: Ability to control the air's Narcia (Extremely difficult)

Ice Narcia: Usually impractical, but can be done.

Inner Narcia is favored by everyone. The power of Narcia is entirely dependent on how dense the user makes it. Because you don't wanna just splash someone with water.

...

Lore

(Can ignore since it's just yap)

Rainarcia wasn't always raining. In the past, it was similar to earth, but far more advanced. But because of the greed of humans, they wanted to harness the divine energy directly from the Water God Rainici. This led to the creation of God Slayer Weapons, extremely high tech gear, wielded by the Seven God Slayers. They actually succeeded, but due to the arrogance of one God Slayer wanting glory, killed the Water God when the order was to capture. This was the beginning of disaster. The skies darkened, the sun sealed away. Rain started falling. 4 hours, 2 days, 3 months, decades. This incident came to be known as The Day the Sky Locked the Sun, or Locked Sun for short.

That God Slayer was executed, labelled as Icarus. The world was panicking. Anarchy was beginning. The masses had enough of the higher ups fucking up the world. Protests and revolutions. Violence. Then, something started to change. The air's property started to change, gaining a water-like quality. Breathing became suffocating, people started dying. Over 70% of the world started to suffocate and drown in air. This incident came to be known as The Culling. The individuals who somehow adapted to this realised they could start wielding Narcia, leading to even more anarchy, a world of violence and desire. People started teaming up, elites started forming, communities were created.
creator: Chun001
